title: Search nav button does not open a dedicated search dialog
description: The 'Search' button in the sidebar navigation does not open a Cmd+K style search dialog or any dedicated search interface. The sidebar filter input is the only search mechanism.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Navigate to http://localhost:1927
2. Click the 'Search' button in the sidebar navigation
3. Observe that no search dialog or palette opens
expected: A dedicated search dialog or Cmd+K palette should open for searching across sessions, documents, etc.
actual: No visible change or search interface appears
impact: Low - the sidebar filter input works well for filtering conversations. A Cmd+K palette would be a nice enhancement.
